name: Dronfield

Danesmoor,
Chesterfield

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Dronfield. It belongs to the North East Local Policing Unit.

Dronfield is a large town with a population of 21,000 persons, located close to the city of Sheffield. It has an active town council, Dronfield Town Council, and a good range of shops.
